title: podochilus khasianus
intro: Podochilus khasianus, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Podochilus khasianus include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are typically dried and powdered, then used in various forms, including capsules, decoctions, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
